name: zsnd_cd_apply_playback_mode
description: zSndCd::ApplyPlaybackMode issues MCI_PLAY for the current CD track and records the accepted playback mode.
known_limits: VC COFF byte comparison is close enough for source-shape triage but not accepted yet; binary-safe remains false.
The smoke patches mciSendCommandA so the MCI command contract can be verified without a physical CD device.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation at 0x4a2600 validates the ready-flag guard, current-track and cached-track-count reads, mode 2 and mode 5 using currentTrack+1, other modes using trackCount+1, g_zSndCdPlayToTrack update, TMSF byte packing, callback window assignment, MCI_PLAY flag choice 0x0d versus 0x05, ReportMciError line 0xf1 on error, and g_zSndCdLastPlayMode update on success.

The native smoke verifies not-ready behavior plus patched-MCI success paths for mode 2 and an end-of-disc mode, including device id, command id, flags, MCI_PLAY_PARMS from/to/callback values, play-to track, and last play mode.
